---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Clarity
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement']
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see in Clarity.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. For example:
- "I'm always frustrated when [...]"
- "It would be helpful if I could [...]"
- "This would improve my productivity by [...]"

## 💡 Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📸 Mockups/Screenshots

If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help illustrate your feature request.

## 🎯 Use Case

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful:
1. As a [type of user]
2. I want to [goal]
3. So that [benefit]

## 🔍 Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature would benefit developers with ADHD
- [ ] This feature aligns with Clarity's design principles
- [ ] I have provided clear use cases and examples
- [ ] This is a feature request, not a bug report

## 📚 Additional Context

Add any other context or references about the feature request here.
